title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Nami as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Carrot-dono and chopper-dono will go with Kiku to Inuarashi's current location.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kinemon, I want to be a Ninja, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now... everybody, put a leaf on your heads!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Here we go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Clothes- Clothes JutsU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WooooOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: POOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 000ohhh) Nam-san~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm not sure how

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm a Ninja^^

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, now that you have all blended in with the culture of this country....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should be able to complete your assigned missions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a second, Kin'Emon, is this... really what a kunoichi should be wearing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The attire of a kunoich!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You sure you're not lying to me!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, let's call upon the person who will guide you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She is a real kunoichi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shino- BU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: TAP...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A REAL KUNOICHI- (2

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What a Treat!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: At your service!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She's dressed completely different...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sanji is trembling all over in shock....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What's up with your outfit?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought I was supposed to be someone with their pants on their head, but I was wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There are two types of kunoichi....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Lame.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MMH... I wonder if I'll be able to close this up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fufu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu. isn't it fine,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Since you're so young?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My name is Shinobu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In the past, I was Kim'Emon's protegeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The technique that I excel in, and most befittingly... is the art of bewitch- ment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it weren't for Nami-San being here, my heart would be shattered already!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I under- stand your pain, young man. Attractive older women are... lethal weapons, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Now, then, everyone is going to go to their respective areas until the time comes for us to gather...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But first, and most importantly, we must discuss the three Samura in particular that we need to find.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can locate them, they'll be an asset worth 100 men each!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their names are... Kawannatsu, Denjiro, and Ashura Douji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In the past, they were Samurai who served Lord Oden just as we did!! They should definitely still be alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The atamayama thieves are here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Run!! Escape from the town!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give that back!! It was given to us by Luffytaro....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lufftard gave those to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shut up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: K'HAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Master Shuten- Maru!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They've got some great stuff here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Because someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They've got fruit, wine, and rice!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who do they think they are!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please give it back. I was going to feed that to my grand- son...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shut up, Gramps!! Drop Dead already!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 56 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
